judge_thought:
Explanation: 
To determine who served longer, we need to look at the tenure of Anders Theil and Ebbe Skovdahl.
Anders Theil served from November 7, 2005, to July 7, 2009. This is approximately 3 years and 8 months.
Ebbe Skovdahl served from October 11, 2003, to November 6, 2005. This is approximately 2 years and 1 month.
Therefore, Anders Theil served longer than Ebbe Skovdahl.
